call_inputs.name: patientData
call_inputs.description: Patient registration details (e.g., name, contact, etc.)

call_outputs.name: registrationResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

call_inputs.name: appointmentData
call_inputs.description: Patient ID and appointment details (e.g., date, time, doctor)

call_outputs.name: bookingResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check slot availability and store appointment

call_outputs.name: recordsResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

call_inputs.name: updateData
call_inputs.description: Patient ID and fields to update (e.g., name, contact)

call_outputs.name: updateResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read current profile and update specified fields
